_comment: Character -> Fish Audio voice registry. ALWAYS reuse the same reference_id for a character so their voice stays consistent across lines and sessions. Find new voices with findvoice.js before assigning.

COP_GENERIC_F.note: Calm Female Officer - generic female cop barks (cop_*_f lines)

xander.desc: XANDER - laid-back young male gamer (I paused my game to be here)

_shop_comment: Shop-interior PER-ROLE voices for the shop-life pack (shop_lines.json -> shopvoices*.js). Five NEW Fish refs below; the remaining roles REUSE existing voices — SUSHI=RIKO, STOCKER=ped_m, DELI=DENISE, DUNKIN=TINA, DOLLAR=ped_f; CUSTOMER round-robins ped_f/ped_old/GLORIA/SKYLER/BRAD/KEISHA; STAFF banter round-robins the role voices. Full mapping in shop_lines.json._voices and SHOPDIALOG.md.
